name: Yellow LED fn
func:
msg.payload = JSON.stringify({ state: msg.payload ? 'on' : 'off', color: 'orange' });
return msg;

name: Green LED fn
func:
msg.payload = JSON.stringify({ state: msg.payload ? 'on' : 'off', color: 'green' });
return msg;

name: Buzzer fn
func:
msg.payload = JSON.stringify({ state: msg.payload ? 'on' : 'off', duration: 2000 });
return msg;

name: Relay fn
func:
msg.payload = JSON.stringify({ state: msg.payload ? 'on' : 'off' });
return msg;

name: Servo fn
func:
msg.payload = JSON.stringify({ angle: msg.payload });
return msg;
